definitions: A prominent Filipina businesswoman and media executive.
The President and CEO of Summit Media, one of the Philippines' largest magazine publishers.
A member of the influential Gokongwei family, known for their diverse business interests in the Philippines.
examples: Lisa Gokongwei-Cheng has been instrumental in the growth of Summit Media.
The interview featured insights from Lisa Gokongwei-Cheng on the future of digital publishing.
Many admire Lisa Gokongwei-Cheng for her leadership in the Philippine media industry.
